---
title: "Overview"
format: html
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dashboardr::.page_config(accessibility = TRUE, inputs = TRUE, crosstab_prefix = "overview")
```

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Load dashboardr (includes dplyr, highcharter as dependencies)
library(dashboardr)

# Global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Bundle loader — reads the RDS bundle once, then extracts datasets by key
.load_bundle <- function(bundle_file, key) {
  if (!exists('.dashboardr_bundle_cache', inherits = FALSE))
    .dashboardr_bundle_cache <<- list()
  if (is.null(.dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]]))
    .dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]] <<- readRDS(bundle_file)
  if (!(key %in% names(.dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]])))
    stop("Bundle key '", key, "' not found in ", bundle_file, call. = FALSE)
  .dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]][[key]]
}

# Load data
data <- .load_bundle('dashboard_data_bundle.rds', 'dataset_large_12141obs.rds')

# Data summary
cat('Dataset loaded:', nrow(data), 'rows,', ncol(data), 'columns\n')

```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'asis'
dashboardr::render_input_row(list(
  list(
    input_id = "month",
    label = "Filter by month",
    type = "select_single",
    filter_var = "month",
    options = c("All", "April", "August", "December", "July", "June", "March", "May", "November", "October", "September"),
    options_from = NULL,
    default_selected = "All",
    placeholder = "Select...",
    width = "300px",
    min = 0,
    max = 100,
    step = 1,
    value = NULL,
    show_value = TRUE,
    inline = TRUE,
    stacked = FALSE,
    stacked_align = "center",
    group_align = "left",
    ncol = NULL,
    nrow = NULL,
    toggle_series = NULL,
    override = FALSE,
    labels = NULL,
    size = "md",
    help = NULL,
    disabled = FALSE,
    mt = NULL,
    mr = NULL,
    mb = NULL,
    ml = NULL,
    icons = NULL
  ),
  list(
    input_id = "week",
    label = "Filter by week",
    type = "select_single",
    filter_var = "week",
    options = c("All", "Week 23", "Week 51", "Week 25", "Week 49", "Week 31", "Week 50", "Week 34", "Week 1", "Week 37", "Week 39", "Week 52", "Week 41", "Week 22", "Week 26", "Week 27", "Week 43", "Week 35", "Week 24", "Week 42", "Week 38", "Week 30", "Week 19", "Week 33", "Week 28", "Week 14", "Week 17", "Week 46", "Week 40", "Week 29", "Week 16", "Week 48", "Week 45", "Week 20", "Week 13", "Week 36", "Week 15", "Week 32", "Week 21", "Week 47", "Week 18", "Week 44"),
    options_from = NULL,
    default_selected = "All",
    placeholder = "Select...",
    width = "300px",
    min = 0,
    max = 100,
    step = 1,
    value = NULL,
    show_value = TRUE,
    inline = TRUE,
    stacked = FALSE,
    stacked_align = "center",
    group_align = "left",
    ncol = NULL,
    nrow = NULL,
    toggle_series = NULL,
    override = FALSE,
    labels = NULL,
    size = "md",
    help = NULL,
    disabled = FALSE,
    mt = NULL,
    mr = NULL,
    mb = NULL,
    ml = NULL,
    icons = NULL
  )
), style = "boxed", align = "center")
```

## How many surveys?


::: {.panel-tabset}

### Survey count per observer

```{r how-many-surveys}
# Survey count per observer
result <- viz_bar(
  data = data,
  title = "Survey count per observer",
  color_palette = NULL,
  weight_var = NULL,
  x_var = "Observer",
  cross_tab_filter_vars = c("month", "week")
)

result <- dashboardr:::.embed_cross_tab(result)

result
```


### Survey count per farm

```{r how-many-surveys-2}
# Survey count per farm
result <- viz_bar(
  data = data,
  title = "Survey count per farm",
  color_palette = NULL,
  weight_var = NULL,
  x_var = "Farm.name",
  cross_tab_filter_vars = c("month", "week")
)

result <- dashboardr:::.embed_cross_tab(result)

result
```


:::
